meaning: n.载货单,旅客名单adj.显然的,明白的vi.出现vt.表明,证明
examples: If you take a look at his biography, you can get a good idea of how his life experiences manifest themselves in his theories of beauty.
The virus needs two weeks to manifest itself.
The anger he felt is manifest in his paintings.
Since childhood, Amy had suffered from severe allergies, which could manifest as hives or eczema.
It is the instrument by which all the primaries of experience are made manifest.
